# A fresh local target is created, migrated, and served in-process without a listener.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --yes tags create --json '{"fqn":"LocalCLI"}'
stdout '"fqn":"LocalCLI"'
stdout '"tag_id":1'
! stderr .
exists local.db

# Consent and a JSON stdin body share one stream without losing buffered body bytes.
stdin consent-and-body.txt
exec mina client --db $WORK/piped.db tags create --json -
stdout '"fqn":"PipeBody"'
! stderr 'invalid JSON request body'
exec mina client --db $WORK/piped.db --yes tags list
stdout '"fqn":"PipeBody"'

# A second invocation reopens the file and observes persisted state.
exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --yes tags list
stdout '"fqn":"LocalCLI"'
stdout '"total_count":1'
! stderr .

# Local asynchronous triggers return only after the terminal run and its IO are complete.
env MINA_BACKUP_FILE_DIRECTORY=$WORK/client-backups
exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --yes operations start-database-backup
stdout '"operation_id":"database-backup"'
stdout '"outcome":"succeeded"'
! stdout '"status_url"'
! stderr .
glob client-backups/mina-backup-*.duckdb

# Failed local asynchronous runs return non-zero with their terminal response on stderr only.
env MINA_BACKUP_FILE_DIRECTORY=$WORK/local.db
! exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --yes operations start-database-backup
! stdout .
stderr '"operation_id":"database-backup"'
stderr '"outcome":"failed"'
env MINA_BACKUP_FILE_DIRECTORY=$WORK/client-backups

# Explicit local and remote selectors are mutually exclusive.
! exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --server http://127.0.0.1:8080 tags list
! stdout .
stderr '--db and --server are mutually exclusive'

# An explicitly empty remote selector is rejected instead of falling back to configured local state.
env MINA_DB=$WORK/local.db
! exec mina client --server '' tags list
! stdout .
stderr 'invalid --server URL ""'

# A database owned by mina serve directs local callers to remote mode.
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/local.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpwait -timeout 10s '"status":"ok"' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
! exec mina client --db $WORK/local.db --yes tags list
! stdout .
stderr 'database .*local.db is already in use'
stderr 'use --server URL to connect to the Mina server that owns it'
kill -INT server
wait server

# Lock guidance is reserved for DuckDB lock failures, not matching path text.
mkdir 'database is locked'
! exec mina client --db 'database is locked' --yes tags list
! stderr 'already in use'
stderr 'Is a directory'

# Mina refuses ephemeral client state when no target is explicit or configured.
env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$WORK/empty-config MINA_DB=
! exec mina client tags list
! stdout .
stderr 'mina client requires a target: use --db PATH for local mode or --server URL for remote mode'

-- consent-and-body.txt --
y
{"fqn":"PipeBody"}
